title: rosa glauca subvar. caballicensis
intro: Rosa glauca subvar. caballicensis, also known as the Caballos Rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa glauca plant, a species of rose native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rosa glauca subvar. caballicensis include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as support for digestive and respiratory issues. Rosa glauca subvar. caballicensis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and vitality.
